Title: Provider Impact 3x3 Scenario Matrix
Note: Shows modeled provider impact across low/base/high repricing and stabilization scenarios.

Title: Provider Impact by Provider Group under Base/Base Scenario
Note: Aggregates Base/Base provider impact by cleaned provider group.

Title: Provider Impact by Provider Class under Base/Base Scenario
Note: Disaggregates Base/Base provider impact by cleaned provider class.

Title: Distribution of Provider-Level Effects under Base/Base Scenario
Note: Shows the distribution of provider-level net impacts as a percentage of net patient revenue.

Title: Provider-Impact Model Coverage and Data Quality Audit
Note: Reports model coverage, source-method counts, fallback use, and data-quality checks.

Title: Exposure-Anomaly Sensitivity under Base/Base Scenario
Note: Tests whether exposure-anomaly records materially change Base/Base results.

Title: Access-Protection Policy Options
Note: Summarizes preferred targeted access protections for rural and behavioral providers.

Title: Access-Protection Options Menu
Note: Shows menu of rural and behavioral access-protection options.

Title: Provider-Level Transition and Rural Access Sensitivity
Note: Provider-level output from the combined transition and rural access sensitivity.

Title: Enhanced Rural Access Sensitivity
Note: Shows rural access-support options, including the preferred enhanced rural guarantee plus implementation floor.

Title: Psychiatric / Behavioral Provider Sensitivity
Note: Shows behavioral institutional repricing options and floor options.

Title: Remaining Severe Psychiatric / Behavioral Effects
Note: Shows remaining severe behavioral impacts under each behavioral treatment scenario.

Title: Behavioral Review Universe
Note: Expanded behavioral review universe including name-flagged records outside the primary behavioral class.
